title: Is This Your Doll?
prompt: Ask if an object belongs to someone using 'Is this your...?' and respond appropriately.
hint: Use 'Is this your...' to ask about ownership. Answer with 'Yes, it is.' or 'No, it isn't.'
sample: Is this your doll? Yes, it is.

ja.prompt: 「Is this your...?」を使って、物の所有者を尋ね、適切に答えましょう。
ja.hint: 所有者を尋ねるときは「Is this your...?」を使います。答えは「Yes, it is.」か「No, it isn't.」です。
ja.sample: Is this your doll? Yes, it is.

zh.prompt: 用「Is this your...?」詢問物品是否屬於某人，並適當回答。
zh.hint: 用「Is this your...?」來詢問所有權。回答用「Yes, it is.」或「No, it isn't.」。
zh.sample: Is this your doll? Yes, it is.
